_about: Material tiebreaker for drawn games (MCTS value signal). A turn-cap draw scores cap*tanh((wv*dVillages + wg*dGold + wu*dUnitValue)/score_scale) from each side's perspective instead of a flat 0, so the value head gets gradient while the policy is too weak to win outright. See tools/draw_tiebreak.py for the full rationale.
_units: 2026-07-21 de-saturation: weights calibrated to MEASURED drawn-game medians (|dV|/total ~0.5, |d unit-gold| ~56) so the median draw scores ~2 => tanh(0.4) ~= 38% of cap -- the LINEAR regime (old weights sat in tanh saturation; differentials barely moved z). weight_gold 0 since 2026-07-20: no MP carryover; gold-at-par taught hoarding (2.8x SL prior). cap 0.3 keeps any draw far below a real win (+1).
